decisions.rationale: AC-3 explicitly requires catalogued Group_section_, Text_caption_, and Icon_muted_ tokens from ir/slices/styles.json — not raw Bubble rgba(82,82,82) inverse bar colors. criteria_audit AC-3 and all ui_evidence entries pass with named style_refs applied. Light-surface bar vs dark Bubble bar is intentional scope compliance; reviewer confirms AC-3 mandates catalog tokens. A future catalogued inverse/surface style (if pixel parity is desired) is design-system polish, not a SHELL-01 blocker.

Icon glyph parity (Lucide CloudOff vs Bubble phosphor cloud-slash on bTHEi) is optional visual polish. SHELL-01 ACs and ui_refs cover element tree, visibility workflow, and Icon_muted_ style_ref — not phosphor icon library matching. ui_evidence bTHEi passes; SHELL-02+ depends_on does not gate on icon set choice. Swap to phosphor-compatible icon only if strict glyph parity becomes an explicit later requirement.

useOnlineStatus.ts and DashboardLayout.tsx are documented in coverage preflight.existing_files_found and AC-2 criteria evidence; integration behavior is fully evidenced and passes review. files_changed omission is coverage-artifact housekeeping for audit traceability only — it does not reduce coverage_pct, fail any criteria_audit, or block downstream shell items whose depends_on on SHELL-01 is satisfiable via the mounted OfflineBanner composable.

summary: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, all ACs and functional checks pass. Accepted: C-1 palette divergence intentional per AC-3 catalog tokens. Deferred: C-2 icon glyph parity (optional polish); C-3 coverage files_changed completeness for audit traceability.
